{{Expand}}

{{Infobox group
| name = Ulethians
| introduced = cradle-12-waybound
}}

== Waybound ==
{{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|[[Mercy]] gave big trees to the [[Ulethians]].<ref name="cradle-12-waybound-c34">''Waybound'', chapter 34</ref>}}

== Notes ==
<references />

[[Category:Groups]]
[[Category:Waybound]]
[[Category:Cradle]]
[[Category:Cradle groups]]
